lambda_i.description: Constant failure rate of each independent component i in the parallel system, used as a parameter in the exponential failure time distribution.

t.description: Time variable representing the operating time in the reliability function R(t).

R(t).description: System reliability function of the parallel system, representing the probability that the system is operational at time t.

n.description: Number of independent components in the parallel system; in the specific background example n=3.
